name: World Neglected Tropical Diseases Day
description: Raises awareness of the devastating impact of NTDs on the poorest populations around the world.

name: World Cancer Day
description: Empowers people across the world to show support, raise our collective voice, and take personal action.

name: World Hearing Day
description: Raises awareness on how to prevent deafness and hearing loss and promotes ear and hearing care across the world.

name: World Oral Health Day
description: Empowers people with the knowledge, tools and confidence to secure good oral health.

name: World Water Day
description: Highlights the importance of fresh water and advocates for the sustainable management of freshwater resources.

name: World Tuberculosis Day
description: Designed to build public awareness about the global epidemic of tuberculosis and efforts to eliminate the disease.

name: World Health Day
description: Celebrated annually and each year draws attention to a specific health topic of concern to people all over the world.

name: Earth Day
description: An annual event to demonstrate support for environmental protection.

name: World Immunization Week
description: Aims to highlight the collective action needed and to promote the use of vaccines to protect people of all ages against disease.

name: World Malaria Day
description: An occasion to highlight the need for continued investment and sustained political commitment for malaria prevention and control.

name: World Hand Hygiene Day
description: Maintains global promotion, visibility, and sustainability of hand hygiene in health care.

name: World No Tobacco Day
description: Intended to encourage a 24-hour period of abstinence from all forms of tobacco consumption around the globe.

name: World Blood Donor Day
description: Raises global awareness of the need for safe blood and blood products for transfusion.

name: International Day of Yoga
description: Aims to raise awareness worldwide of the many benefits of practicing yoga.

name: Doctors' Day
description: Honors physicians for the work they do for their patients, the communities they work in and for society as a whole.

name: World Hepatitis Day
description: An opportunity to step up national and international efforts on hepatitis, encourage actions and engagement by individuals, partners and the public.

name: World Breastfeeding Week
description: Aimed to highlight the huge benefits that breastfeeding can bring to both the health and welfare of babies, as well as a wider push for maternal health.

name: World Patient Safety Day
description: Calls for global solidarity and concerted action by all countries and international partners to improve patient safety.

name: World Mental Health Day
description: Raises awareness of mental health issues around the world and mobilizing efforts in support of mental health.

name: Global Handwashing Day
description: A global advocacy day dedicated to increasing awareness and understanding about the importance of handwashing with soap as an effective and affordable way to prevent diseases and save lives.

name: World Prematurity Day
description: Raises awareness of preterm birth and the concerns of preterm babies and their families worldwide.

name: World AMR Awareness Week
description: A global campaign to improve awareness and understanding of antimicrobial resistance (AMR) and encourage best practices among the public.

name: World COPD Day
description: Organized by the Global Initiative for Chronic Obstructive Lung Disease (GOLD) in collaboration with health care professionals and COPD patient groups throughout the world.

name: World AIDS Day
description: An opportunity for people worldwide to unite in the fight against HIV, to show support for people living with HIV, and to commemorate those who have died from an AIDS-related illness.
